name: flutter-slipstream-copilot
description: Initial GitHub Copilot plugin manifest for flutter-slipstream (draft).

tools.name: packages MCP server
tools.description: Provides package_summary, library_stub, and class_stub by reading local .pub-cache.

tools.name: inspector MCP server
tools.description: Launches and inspects Flutter apps (run_app, reload, take_screenshot, get_semantics, etc.).

tools.name: deps-check hook
tools.description: Pre-tool hook for package currency checks (pub-add / pubspec edits).

notes: This is an initial draft manifest. Update permissions, tool schemas, and hosting/exec details before publishing. See repository README and docs/DESIGN.md for tool contracts.
